scripts.sync: npm run compile && npm run sync --workspace=contracts
scripts.dev:stack: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8545 && npm run deploy:local && npm run dev:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n chain,stack -c blue,green "npm run node" "npm run dev:stack"
scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run build --workspace=frontend
